name: matrix 3x3
formula: \begin{matrix} a & b & c \\ d & e & f \\ g & h & i \end{matrix}

name: env gather multi
formula: \begin{gathered} a = b \\ c = d \\ e = f \end{gathered}

name: env align multi
formula: \begin{aligned} x &= y + z & y &= w + t \\ a &= b & c &= d \end{aligned}

name: complex matrix
formula: \begin{pmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{pmatrix}^{-1} = \frac{1}{ad-bc} \begin{pmatrix} d & -b \\ -c & a \end{pmatrix}
